# MODEL: Two-state timedCGS for TCTL AF vs AG regression
#
# PURPOSE: s0 is forced to s1 (no self-loop); p holds only at s1.
#          AF p = {s0, s1}  (s0 must reach s1 where p holds)
#          AG p = {s1}      (s0 does not satisfy p itself)
#
# LOGIC: TCTL

Transition
0 a
0 *
Name_State
s0 s1
Initial_State
s0
Atomic_propositions
p
Labelling
0
1
Number_of_agents
1
Clocks
x
Clock_constraints
x<=1 x<=1
x<=1 x<=1
Invariants
x<=2
x<=2
